_meta.description: Python progress bar library (44M+ weekly pip installs). Defines two built-in bar character sets: ASCII and UTF (Unicode smooth blocks). Custom character strings can be passed via the ascii parameter.

Bar.ASCII.description: ASCII fallback. The space is the empty character, digits 1-9 represent partial fill (10%-90%), and # is the full fill.
Bar.ASCII.notes: Used when ascii=True or when the terminal does not support Unicode

Bar.UTF.description: Unicode smooth blocks. Empty string for empty, then left-fractional blocks from 1/8 to full block.
Bar.UTF.notes: Used by default when terminal supports Unicode. Inspired by pip's progress bar.

custom_example.description: Users can pass any string as the ascii parameter to use as custom bar fill characters
custom_example.notes: Characters are distributed proportionally across the fill
